name: Sugar and Spice Cashews
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter.
2. Add sugar and corn syrup to the melted butter. Microwave on high for 2 minutes.
3. Stir, then cook on high for an additional 3 minutes.
4. Mix in vanilla and spices.
5. Pour immediately over cashews.
6. Toss and cook on high for another 3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Spread on waxed paper to cool. Makes 1 quart.
